message:
perf(btree): add cursor position caching for sequential insert fast path

Add seek_cache field to BtCursor that stores (leaf_page, last_rowid) from
successful seeks. On sequential forward seeks (target > cached_rowid),
try the cached leaf directly to skip root-to-leaf descent.

This optimization targets the 9-23x UPDATE gap by eliminating tree
traversal overhead for sequential write patterns (bulk INSERTs, UPDATEs
on sorted tables).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
